title: Fundamentals of Terraform on Azure
summary: Learn the fundamentals of how Terraform enables you to manage infrastructure deployments on Azure.

sections.title: Fundamentals of Terraform on Azure
sections.summary: Learn the fundamentals of how Terraform enables you to manage infrastructure deployments on Azure.

lessons.title: Introduction to infrastructure as code using Terraform
lessons.content_md:
Learn the fundamentals of how Terraform can help you adopt infrastructure as code to quickly and confidently scale your cloud deployments.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/terraform-introduction-to-infrastructure-as-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to infrastructure as code using Terraform

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Fundamentals of Terraform on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Fundamentals of Terraform on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
